testcase.name: Common Datepicker Selecting Date

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 6000ms: expected '<input.size-medium.status-basic.shape-rectangle.nb-transition.cdk-focused.cdk-mouse-focused>' to have value 'Mar 1, 2026', but the value was 'Apr 1, 2026'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 6000ms: expected '<input.size-medium.status-basic.shape-rectangle.nb-transition.cdk-focused.cdk-mouse-focused>' to have value 'Mar 1, 2026', but the value was 'Apr 1, 2026' at Context.eval (webpack://project_cypress_playground/./cypress/e2e/forms/date_picker/date_picker.cy.js:19:27) at getRet (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122807:20) at tryCatcher (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:1777:23) at Promise.attempt.Promise.try (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:4285:29) at Context.thenFn (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122818:66) at Context.then (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:123069:21) at wrapped (https://playground.bondaracademy.com/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:146330:19)
+ expected - actual
-'Apr 1, 2026' +'Mar 1, 2026'

testcase.name: Common Datepicker Selecting Date from other Months
